summary: Returns the final non-empty POSIX-style path segment, optionally removing a matching trailing extension.
signature_intent: Accepts a path-like string as the first input and an optional string extension as the second input; returns a string.
behavior: Validates the first input as a path string using the host path validation rules.
Throws TypeError when the second input is provided and is not a string.
Ignores trailing slash characters when identifying the final segment.
Returns the final segment after the last slash character.
Removes the supplied extension only when it matches the end of the final segment.
Leaves the final segment unchanged when the supplied extension does not match.
edge_cases: Returns an empty string when no non-slash segment exists.
Returns an empty string when the supplied extension exactly equals the entire path string.
Does not remove an empty extension.
Does not remove an extension longer than the path string.
If extension removal would consume the whole final segment, returns the full final segment instead.
forbidden_details: Loop mechanics or incidental implementation quirks.
